calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER JAMES EUGENIO PINA, JR.'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:46 am and concluding at 9:48 am.

Petitioner James Eugenio Pina Jr. is not present.

Moving party not appearing, the matter is taken off calendar and dismissed by the Court without prejudice. (D505)
